metadata.title: You Make Loving Fun (2001 Remaster)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:16.68] Sweet wonderful you
[00:22.88] 
[00:25.33] You make me happy with the things you do
[00:31.96] Oh, can it be so?
[00:38.04] 
[00:40.40] This feeling follows me wherever I go
[00:45.52] 
[00:48.37] I never did believe in miracles
[00:56.58] But I've a feeling it's time to try
[01:01.37] 
[01:03.51] I never did believe in the ways of magic
[01:11.77] But I'm beginning to wonder why
[01:16.65] 
[01:48.90] I never did believe in miracles
[01:57.05] But I've a feeling it's time to try
[02:01.54] 
[02:04.24] I never did believe in the ways of magic
[02:11.95] But I'm beginning to wonder why
[02:18.27] Don't, don't break the spell
[02:24.35] 
[02:26.87] It would be different and you know it will
[02:33.44] You, you make loving fun
[02:39.25] 
[02:41.67] And I don't have to tell you but you're the only one
[02:48.77] You make loving fun
[02:54.38] (It's all I wanna do)
[02:56.43] You make loving fun
[03:02.03] (It's all I wanna do)
[03:03.98] You make loving fun
[03:09.46] (It's all I wanna do)
[03:11.52] You make loving fun
[03:16.67] (It's all I wanna do)
